17.reason: Missing space between numbers; should be "%d " to match expected output format with spaces

2.reason: Array b is too small; when n=10, accessing b[10] is out-of-bounds (valid indices 0-9). Should be at least size 11.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Array b is too small; when n=10, accessing b[10] is out-of-bounds (valid indices 0-9). Should be at least size 11.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Array size is insufficient for N=10; accessing b[10] causes out-of-bounds error. Size should be at least 11.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Array b is declared with size 10, but indices up to n (which can be 10) are accessed, causing out-of-bounds access. It should be at least size 11.
